modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.

properties.observable_contract: Inside the inclusive deadband window from `sigin_dead_low` to `sigin_dead_high`, drive `sigout` to `0 V`.
Below the lower edge, drive the signed excess below `sigin_dead_low`; above the upper edge, drive the signed excess above `sigin_dead_high` while preserving sign.
Use the public lower and upper threshold values so the output is continuous at both deadband edges.

title: Deadband Voltage
